content:
```yaml
automation:
  - alias: Turn on lights at sunset
    trigger:
      - platform: sun
        event: sunset
    action:
      - service: light.turn_on
        target:
          entity_id: light.living_room
  - alias: Turn off lights at sunrise
    trigger:
      - platform: sun
        event: sunrise
    action:
      - service: light.turn_off
        target:
          entity_id: light.living_room
```
